expectations.evidence: Explains slow triage, excessive pointer travel, mode switching — competitive gap
5 non-goals: backend changes, server search, vim multi-key, replace drag-drop, global shortcuts
Decides: global listener scoped to board, Zustand for focus/filter state, 1500ms sequence timeout
Each shortcut verified individually, includes input-field suppression check
3 alternatives: tab-only nav, local component state only, do nothing
Lines 70-74 map each shortcut key to exact store method calls (addTask(columnId), openTaskDetail(taskId), etc.) — this is an embedded mechanism table in Data & IO

notes: One assertion fail: shortcut-to-method mapping in Data & IO. Also prescribes exact new file paths (TaskFilterBar.tsx, ShortcutsHelpOverlay.tsx, useBoardKeyboardShortcuts.ts) and exact Zustand state field names.
